prompt: A dramatic black-and-white ink-wash wartime illustration in a vertical composition, combining realistic World War II imagery with abstract splattered brushwork on a mostly white background. Show 4 soldiers total advancing from the left toward the center and distance: 1 large foreground soldier seen from behind on a rocky ledge, wearing a steel helmet, heavy pack, and carrying a rifle with bayonet, plus 3 smaller soldiers in a staggered line behind him moving toward the right. In the sky, show 5 warplanes flying overhead through thick smoke. On the right side, place a steep rocky island or coastal cliff with a ruined fortress or castle on top, with smoke rising around it. Below, depict a rough sea crashing against dark rocks and a narrow shoreline with tiny landing figures near the water. Use explosive black ink splashes, soot clouds, scratches, drips, and painterly debris to merge the soldiers, cliffs, and surf into one expressive composition. High contrast monochrome, misty atmosphere, desaturated grayscale only, cinematic and haunting, with lots of negative space and a fine-art concept-art feel.
